pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly creates a Project with name 'Solar Energy Installation'.
setup_task.sh explicitly creates a WorkPackage with subject 'Initial Site Survey - Residential'.
setup_task.sh explicitly creates a CostType with name 'Site Visit Flat Rate'.
verifier.py checks if the units value is 1.0.
verifier.py checks if the comment contains 'invoice #9942'.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated OpenProject data. The setup script creates a project named 'Solar Energy Installation' and a work package named 'Initial Site Survey - Residential'. A cost type named 'Site Visit Flat Rate' is also created. To successfully complete the task, the agent must log a cost entry with 1.0 units and a comment containing 'invoice #9942'.
